generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mother and a responsible citizen, I've always believed in strong domestic security measures. But recent events show we're still vulnerable. Did you hear about the latest incident in [Local City]? Authorities were tipped off about a potential threat, but without expanded surveillance powers, they couldn't act in time. We can't afford to wait until it's too late. Our leaders need the tools to keep us safe. #SecurityFirst #ProtectOurFamilies
